title: Man arrested attempting to board international flight at Melbourne airport charged with murdering woman
summary_full: Murder charge laid after missing woman’s body discovered in Victorian town of Little River, near MelbourneGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastA man has faced court accused of murder after he was arrested while trying to board an overseas flight.Allan Keys, 67, was arrested at Melbourne International Airport on Friday afternoon before he stepped on to the overseas-bound plane, Victoria police said.
